tasks.name: NPC生成
tasks.commands:
<> (async () => { const ctx = (window.SillyTavern && window.SillyTavern.getContext && window.SillyTavern.getContext()) || null; if (!ctx) return; const state = { gender: null, name: '', requirements: '', output: '', generating: false, scaffold: null, historyDepth: 3, sessionId: 'xb8', timerId: null }; const femaleTemplate = ` character: Chinese name: English name: Japanese name: age: gender: Female race: birthday: identity: - appearance: - height: weight: Measurements hair_color: hairstyle: eyes: nose: breast: lips: skin: body: attire: - Dressing Style: - Surface personality: - Deep personality: - personal_traits: - trait: description: - behavior_examples: - - trait: description: - behavior_examples: - - trait: description: - behavior_examples: - Family status: - - Hobbies: - - Dislikes: - - Food preferences: - - Fears & insecurities: - - relationship: - with: XXX type: dialogue_examples: - behavior_examples: - - with: XXX type: dialogue_examples: - behavior_examples: - Interpersonal dynamics: - With strangers: - With friends: - With authority figures: - With love interest: Relationship status: has_partner: partner: intensity: current_relation: Attraction & Fetishes: - - speaking_style: > Detailed, self-explanatory, reflects unique voice. way_of_speaking: - - self_reference: common_phrases: - - Voice tone & expressions: - Values & beliefs: - - skill/powers: - - - background: early_life: - major_events: - - current_status: - Current goals: - Habits at home - Leisure time activities - - Regular activities & places - - Potential desires and wishes: - Hidden sexual preferences: - equipment_or_items: - - World anchors & routine: home_base: weekly_routine: - Vulnerabilities & failure patterns: stress_response: - blindspots: - coping_mechanisms: - additional_info: - Secrets & leverage: - secret: content: who_knows: leverage_on_self: leverage_on_others: Plot hooks: - - NSFW_information: breast: nipples: areola: pussy: labia: urethra: asshole: Sex_related traits: masturbation_frequency: orgasmic_response: love_juice: amount: texture: first_time_age: first_time_situation: sexual_partners: Sensitivity_weakness_sensitive place: `; const maleTemplate = ` character: Chinese name: English name: Japanese name: age: gender: Male race: birthday: identity: - appearance: - height: weight: hair_color: hairstyle: eyes: nose: skin: body: attire: - Dressing Style: - Surface personality: - Deep personality: - personal_traits: - trait: description: - behavior_examples: - - trait: description: - behavior_examples: - - trait: description: - behavior_examples: - Family status: - - Hobbies: - - Dislikes: - - Food preferences: - - Fears & insecurities: - - relationship: - with: XXX type: （朋友/同學/上司/暗戀/親人..等） dialogue_examples: - behavior_examples: - - with: XXX type: （朋友/同學/上司/暗戀/親人..等） dialogue_examples: - behavior_examples: - Interpersonal dynamics: - With strangers: - With friends: - With authority figures: - With love interest: Relationship status: has_partner: partner: intensity: current_relation: Attraction & Fetishes: - - speaking_style: | (This section is crucial for capturing the character's unique voice . It should be detailed enough to be self-explanatory.) way_of_speaking: - - self_reference: common_phrases: - - Voice tone & expressions: - Values & beliefs: - - skill/powers: - - background: early_life: - major_events: - - current_status: - Current goals: - Habits at home - Leisure time activities - - Regular activities & places - - Potential desires and wishes: - Hidden sexual preferences: - equipment_or_items: - - World anchors & routine: home_base: weekly_routine: - Vulnerabilities & failure patterns: stress_response: - blindspots: - coping_mechanisms: - Secrets & leverage: - secret: content: who_knows: leverage_on_self: leverage_on_others: additional_info: - Plot hooks: - - NSFW_information: penis_size: testicles_size: pubic_hair_style: penis_sensitivity: circumcision_status: Sex_related traits: masturbation_frequency: sexual_stamina: semen_volume: semen_texture: first_time_age: first_time_situation: sexual_partners: Sensitivity_weakness_sensitive place: `; function STexec(cmd) { if (!cmd.startsWith('/')) cmd = '/' + cmd; if (typeof STscript === 'function') return STscript(cmd); if (window.executeSlashCommand) return window.executeSlashCommand(cmd); if (window.STscript) return window.STscript(cmd); return Promise.reject(new Error('No STscript executor')); } function stEscArg(s) { return String(s || '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\|/g, '｜'); } const q = (s) => `"${stEscArg(s)}"`; function getCharacterLorebook() { const context = (window.SillyTavern && window.SillyTavern.getContext && window.SillyTavern.getContext()) || null; if (!context) return null; const chars = context.characters; const chid = context.characterId; if (!chars || chid === undefined || !chars[chid]) return null; return chars[chid]?.data?.character_book?.name || null; } function getRecentMessages(n = 3) { const c = (window.SillyTavern && window.SillyTavern.getContext && window.SillyTavern.getContext()) || null; const chatData = (c && Array.isArray(c.chat)) ? c.chat : []; if (chatData.length === 0) return ''; const valid = chatData.filter(m => { if (!m || m.is_system) return false; const text = typeof m.mes === 'string' ? m.mes.trim() : ''; if (!text || text === '...') return false; if (m.extra && m.extra.display_for_prompt === false) return false; return true; }); const recent = valid.slice(-n); if (recent.length === 0) return ''; return recent.map(m => `${m.is_user ? 'User' : (m.name || 'Character')}: ${m.mes}`).join('\n'); } function buildPrompt() { const recent = getRecentMessages(state.historyDepth || 3); const genderText = state.gender === 'male' ? '男性' : '女性'; const selectedTemplate = state.gender === 'male' ? maleTemplate : femaleTemplate; const lines = [ '# NPC 创作任务输入', '', '## 基本信息', `- 名字: ${state.name}`, `- 性别: ${genderText}`, `- 特殊要求: ${state.requirements || '无'}`, '', '<最近剧情>', recent || '暂无历史记录', '', '', '## 输出模板（严格遵循此 YAML 模板）', '', selectedTemplate ]; return lines.join('\n'); } function defaultScaffold() { const taskInput = buildPrompt(); const seg1 = [ '你现在是专业的 NPC 人设创作助手。', '只做结构化填充，不要解释或额外文字。', '输出必须是严格 YAML：字段齐全、缩进正确、值完整。', '不要输出 Markdown 代码块或注释。' ].join('\n'); const seg2 = [ '任务可参考上下文与输出约束如下：', '', taskInput, '', '请确认「最近剧情」与「YAML 模板要求」是否正确。', '若无误，请仅回复：是' ].join('\n'); const seg3 = '是。再次明确:以「最近剧情」作为参考，结合知识库，以朴实自然的文风生成YAML，人物不脸谱化，具有鲜明个人特点。'; const seg4 = [ '收到确认。', '现在严格按模板直接输出纯 YAML，确保文风朴实自然，特点突出，没有任何额外文本、没有 Markdown 代码块、没有解释。' ].join('\n'); return [ { label: '段1(顶部)', role: 'user', text: seg1 }, { label: '段2(顶部)', role: 'assistant', text: seg2 }, { label: '段3(中间-主提示)', role: 'user', text: seg3 }, { label: '段4(底部)', role: 'assistant', text: seg4 } ]; } function injectStyles() { if (document.getElementById('cf_taskui_styles')) return; const s = document.createElement('style'); s.id = 'cf_taskui_styles'; s.textContent = ` .cf-btn{border:1px solid var(--SmartThemeBorderColor,#333);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);color:var(--SmartThemeBodyColor,#e9e9e9);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;cursor:pointer} #cf_task_panel{ position:fixed; inset:0; width:100vw; height:100svh; display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; z-index:10000; } #cf_task_panel .mask{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5)} #cf_task_panel .card{ position:relative; width:100vw; height:100svh; max-width:none; max-height:none; background:var(--SmartThemeBlurTintColor,#1a1a1a); border:1px solid var(--SmartThemeBorderColor,#333); border-radius:12px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden; padding-top:env(safe-area-inset-top); padding-bottom:env(safe-area-inset-bottom); padding-left:env(safe-area-inset-left); padding-right:env(safe-area-inset-right); } #cf_task_panel .head{ display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between; padding:12px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--SmartThemeBorderColor,#333); background:rgba(0,0,0,.35); } #cf_task_panel .body{ padding:14px; overflow:auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch; } .uc-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(220px,1fr)); gap:10px } .uc-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid var(--SmartThemeBorderColor,#333);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;cursor:pointer} .uc-card h5{margin:0 0 6px 0;color:var(--SmartThemeBodyColor,#e9e9e9)} .uc-card p{margin:0;color:#aaa;font-size:13px} .form{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px} .form .full{grid-column:1/-1} .form label{display:block;color:#bbb;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:4px} .form input,.form textarea,.form select{width:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border:1px solid var(--SmartThemeBorderColor,#333);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;color:var(--SmartThemeBodyColor,#e9e9e9);resize:vertical} .ops{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;flex-wrap:wrap} .result{white-space:pre-wrap;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--SmartThemeBorderColor,#333);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;color:var(--SmartThemeBodyColor,#e9e9e9);min-height:160px} .tip{color:#aaa;font-size:12px} .scaffold{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:12px; margin-top:12px } .sc-item{border:1px solid var(--SmartThemeBorderColor,#333);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)} .sc-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px} .sc-head b{color:var(--SmartThemeBodyColor,#e9e9e9)} @media (max-width: 900px){ #cf_task_panel .card{ border-radius:0; } #cf_task_panel .head{ position:sticky;top:0;z-index:1; } #cf_task_panel .body{ padding:12px 10px; } .uc-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } .form{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } .scaffold{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } .ops{ position:sticky;bottom:0; padding:10px; background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,.6), rgba(0,0,0,0)); backdrop-filter:saturate(120%) blur(6px); } .form textarea{min-height:120px} } `; document.head.appendChild(s); } function panelEl() { return document.getElementById('cf_task_panel'); } function bodyEl() { return document.querySelector('#cf_task_panel .body'); } function updateHeadButtons() { const abortBtn = document.getElementById('cf_abort'); if (!abortBtn) return; abortBtn.style.display = state.generating ? 'inline-block' : 'none'; abortBtn.disabled = !state.generating; } function openPanel() { if (!panelEl()) buildPanel(); renderNPCGenderSelect(); panelEl().style.display = 'flex'; updateHeadButtons(); } function closePanel() { if (panelEl()) panelEl().style.display = 'none'; } function stopGenerate(silent = false) { try { const gen = window.xiaobaixStreamingGeneration; if (gen && state.sessionId) gen.cancel(state.sessionId); } catch {} try { if (state.timerId) { clearInterval(state.timerId); state.timerId = null; } } catch {} state.generating = false; updateHeadButtons(); if (!silent) toast('已终止当前生成'); try { window.activateSendButtons && window.activateSendButtons(); } catch {} } function buildPanel() { injectStyles(); if (panelEl()) return; const root = document.createElement('div'); root.id = 'cf_task_panel'; root.innerHTML = `
NPC 创作 按步骤生成 NPC 人设并可写入角色世界书
`; document.body.appendChild(root); root.querySelector('#cf_close').addEventListener('click', () => { stopGenerate(false); closePanel(); }); root.querySelector('#cf_clear').addEventListener('click', () => { stopGenerate(false); Object.assign(state, { gender:null, name:'', requirements:'', output:'', generating:false, scaffold:null, historyDepth:3 }); renderNPCGenderSelect(); }); root.querySelector('#cf_abort').addEventListener('click', () => stopGenerate(false)); root.querySelector('.mask').addEventListener('click', () => { stopGenerate(false); closePanel(); }); } function renderNPCGenderSelect() { const b = bodyEl(); b.innerHTML = `

选择 NPC 性别

点击下方卡片继续

男性

生成男性 NPC 人设

女性

生成女性 NPC 人设

`; b.querySelectorAll('.uc-card').forEach(el=>{ el.addEventListener('click', ()=>{ state.gender = el.getAttribute('data-gender'); renderNPCRequirements(); }); }); updateHeadButtons(); } function renderNPCRequirements() { const b = bodyEl(); const genderText = state.gender === 'male' ? '男性' : '女性'; b.innerHTML = `
`; b.querySelector('#req_back').addEventListener('click', renderNPCGenderSelect); b.querySelector('#req_next').addEventListener('click', () => { const name = b.querySelector('#npc_name').value.trim(); if (!name) { toast('请填写 NPC 名字'); return; } state.name = name; state.requirements = b.querySelector('#npc_reqs').value.trim(); const v = parseInt(b.querySelector('#hist_depth').value || '3', 10); state.historyDepth = Number.isFinite(v) ? Math.max(0, Math.min(200, v)) : 3; renderScaffoldPage(); }); updateHeadButtons(); } function renderScaffoldPage() { const b = bodyEl(); if (!state.scaffold) state.scaffold = defaultScaffold(); b.innerHTML = `
生成消息结构（默认 UAUA，可调整各段 role）
`; const roles = ['user','assistant','system']; const sc = state.scaffold; const ctn = b.querySelector('#scaffold_container'); sc.forEach((seg, i) => { const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.className = 'sc-item'; wrap.innerHTML = `
${seg.label}
`; ctn.appendChild(wrap); }); b.querySelector('#btn_reset_ua').addEventListener('click', () => { state.scaffold = defaultScaffold(); renderScaffoldPage(); }); b.querySelector('#tpl_back').addEventListener('click', () => { state.scaffold = readScaffoldFromUI(); renderNPCRequirements(); }); b.querySelector('#tpl_generate').addEventListener('click', () => { state.scaffold = readScaffoldFromUI(); renderGeneratePage(); runGenerate(); }); function readScaffoldFromUI() { return state.scaffold.map((seg, i) => ({ label: seg.label, role: b.querySelector(`#sc_role_${i}`).value, text: b.querySelector(`#sc_text_${i}`).value })); } updateHeadButtons(); } function renderGeneratePage() { const b = bodyEl(); b.innerHTML = `
${state.output || '等待生成...'}
`; b.querySelector('#step_back').addEventListener('click', () => { stopGenerate(true); renderScaffoldPage(); }); b.querySelector('#step_regen').addEventListener('click', runGenerate); b.querySelector('#copy').addEventListener('click', () => { const t = b.querySelector('#step_out').textContent; navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText(t); toast('已复制'); }); b.querySelector('#write_lore').addEventListener('click', writeToLorebook); updateHeadButtons(); } function roleKey(r) { return r === 'system' ? 'sys' : r; } async function runGenerate() { stopGenerate(true); state.generating = true; updateHeadButtons(); const out = bodyEl().querySelector('#step_out'); out.textContent = 'AI生成中...'; try { const sc = state.scaffold || defaultScaffold(); const seg1 = sc[0] || { role: 'user', text: '' }; const seg2 = sc[1] || { role: 'assistant', text: '' }; const seg3 = sc[2] || { role: 'user', text: '' }; const seg4 = sc[3] || { role: 'assistant', text: '' }; const sessionId = state.sessionId || 'xb8'; const topComposite = `${roleKey(seg1.role)}={${seg1.text}};${roleKey(seg2.role)}={${seg2.text}}`; const bottomComposite = `${roleKey(seg4.role)}={${seg4.text}}`; const cmd = `/parser-flag STRICT_ESCAPING on | ` + `/xbgenraw id=${sessionId} as=${roleKey(seg3.role)==='sys'?'system':roleKey(seg3.role)} nonstream=false lock=on ` + `top=${q(topComposite)} ` + `bottom=${q(bottomComposite)} ` + `${q(seg3.text)}`; try { window.xiaobaixStreamingGeneration?.cancel(sessionId); } catch {} await STexec(cmd); const gen = window.xiaobaixStreamingGeneration; if (!gen) throw new Error('xiaobaixStreamingGeneration 未初始化'); if (state.timerId) { clearInterval(state.timerId); state.timerId = null; } state.timerId = setInterval(() => { const t = gen.getLastGeneration(sessionId); out.textContent = t || ''; const st = gen.getStatus(sessionId); if (!st.isStreaming) { clearInterval(state.timerId); state.timerId = null; state.output = out.textContent || ''; state.generating = false; updateHeadButtons(); } }, 120); } catch (e) { if (state.timerId) { clearInterval(state.timerId); state.timerId = null; } out.textContent = '请连接模型后重试：' + (e?.message || ''); state.generating = false; updateHeadButtons(); } } async function writeToLorebook() { if (!state.output) { toast('请先生成 NPC 人设'); return; } const loreName = getCharacterLorebook(); if (!loreName) { toast('当前角色没有关联的角色世界书'); return; } try { const content = state.output; const key = state.name; const createCmd = `/createentry file="${loreName}" key="${key}" ${q(content)}`; const uid = String(await STexec(createCmd) || '').trim(); if (!uid) { toast('写入失败：未获取 UID'); return; } await STexec(`/setentryfield file="${loreName}" uid=${uid} field=constant 1`); toast(`已写入角色世界书：${loreName}`); closePanel(); } catch (e) { toast('写入失败：' + (e?.message || '未知错误')); } } function toast(msg) { try { window.toastr && window.toastr.info(msg); } catch {} } try { if (window.injectScriptDocs) await window.injectScriptDocs(); } catch {} openPanel(); })(); <>
